steps.title: Locate the defining description
steps.content: The appositive phrase after the colon — “present yet having essentially no effect on our bodily processes” — reveals exactly what state these genes are in. They exist but don't function.

steps.title: Match the answer to the definition
steps.content: Dormant means asleep or inactive — the precise word for genes that are present yet have no functional effect on our bodies. The others either contradict “present” (lacking), contradict “having no effect” (decisive), or don't convey inactivity (variable). That matches choice D — D is correct.
